creator: duchateau.olivier@gmail.com
text:
Based on Jimmy Olgeni's work [1].

There's an issue with py-chardet (I used this PR [2]), URL in MASTER_SITES macro isn't any more valid. Archive can be found on Python Package Index (pypi), and version is equivalent to "chardet2" [3]. 

[1] http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=166142
[2] http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=164855
[3] http://pypi.python.org/pypi/chardet2

Fix: Patch attached with submission follows:
